summary: Test suite violates critical requirement: task mandates 'all testing goes through the pipeline' (act), but secret-rotation.bats runs 16 tests directly against the script, not through the workflow. Only 3 act end-to-end test cases. Missing shellcheck/bash -n validation (required by task). Missing fixture files (sample.json, all-ok.json, all-expired.json, .actrc) makes verification impossible. Limited edge case coverage (no boundary dates, type validation, special characters, very old/future dates). Would not reliably catch regressions due to incomplete validation of date calculations, data types, and threshold boundaries.
